## Infographic: Canada Health Act
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 417 KB, 1 pages)
Organization: Health Canada
Date published: February 2020
If the provinces and territories fulfill the Canada Health  Act’s criteria and conditions:
- Public Administration
And ensure there is no extra-billing and user chargers for  insured health services
They are entitled to their full Canada Health Transfer
